content:
8.2 Example Event: Session End

Trigger: a creative or technical session completes.

$AUTOMATION_ENGINE should:

Bundle the raw conversation or notes into a session log under $ARCHIVE_ROOT/sessions.
Call a summarization prompt under $PROMPT_ROOT/analysis to produce a CONTINUITY-ARCHIVE-LOG artifact.
Update $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta/index_sessions.tsv.
If new worlds, characters, or specs were created, ensure their indices are updated and cross-links recorded in SEALs.

8.3 Example Event: Naming Pattern Update

Trigger: a SYSTEM-layer decision modifies the naming grammar.

$AUTOMATION_ENGINE should:

Ensure the change is captured as a new SYSTEM-META-SPEC artifact in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/specs and mirrored in $OS_ROOT/specs.
Run a check across $PROMPT_ROOT to patch prompt templates that reference outdated naming rules, via an automated refactor workflow implemented in os-foundation.
Emit a continuity log explaining the change and its wave association.
